description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, dark gray gable roof and a prominent wooden-fenced patio or yard area. The structure features a carport attached to the left side, leading to a driveway with a white sedan parked in front. The main entrance is sheltered under the carport, and the house has large windows, especially on the right side, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth gray material, contrasting with the wooden fencing and green lawn in the backyard. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on horizontal lines and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, wooden-fenced yard, carport, and large windows. The exterior is gray with a clean, geometric design and a driveway leading to a parked car.
description_view_0: View from above the backyard shows the wooden-fenced yard, carport, and main entrance under the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, carport, and the white car parked in front, with the wooden fence enclosing the backyard.
description_view_2: Front view displays the driveway, carport, main entrance, and large windows on the right side of the house.
description_view_3: Rear side view emphasizes the backyard lawn, wooden fence, and the back of the house with a small window.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
